AdGuard Home is an open-source, network-wide DNS server designed to block ads and trackers across all devices on a home network. It functions by intercepting DNS requests and redirecting malicious domains to a null route, thereby preventing connections to unwanted servers without requiring client-side software.

вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–

Webclaw is a high-performance web scraping tool written in Rust, designed for AI agents. It efficiently extracts structured data from web pages, optimizing content for LLM consumption by reducing token count and removing unnecessary elements, all without requiring a headless browser.

Netscanner is a Rust-based terminal network scanner and diagnostic tool that provides a modern TUI for analyzing network interfaces, scanning WiFi networks, and performing packet dumping and port scanning. It allows users to switch active interfaces, monitor WiFi signal strength, ping IPv4 CIDRs, and filter packet logs.

InkSight is a system that converts photos of handwritten text into editable digital ink. It uses a Vision Transformer and mT5 architecture to process diverse handwriting styles and backgrounds, supporting both word-level and full-page conversion for practical digitization.
